title: ononis natrix subsp. candeliana
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. candeliana, also known as Candelilla Ononis, is a sub-species of the Ononis natrix plant, a type of legume native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, Candelilla Ononis has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Candelilla Ononis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it has also been used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application for wound healing.
